rules.description: Support for TLS 1.0 and 1.1 on Entra domain services is retiring. Update the TLS policy to the latest version.
rules.fix: Support for TLS 1.0 and 1.1 on Entra domain services is retiring. Update the TLS policy to the latest version.

rules.description: To improve the resiliency of a Microsoft Entra Domain Services managed domain, or deploy to additional geographic locations close to your applications, you can use replica sets. You can add a replica set to any peered virtual network in any Azure region that supports Domain Services.
You need to use a minimum of Enterprise SKU for your managed domain to support replica sets.
rules.fix: use a minimum of Enterprise SKU for your managed domain to support replica sets
